text: REAL at helper level, fixed alias-safely; not reachable via current public API (public amatrix_bind_resident pre-releases; .amatrix_prepare_resident_arg only overwrites dead keys). .amatrix_bind_resident overwrote the registry entry without releasing a prior LIVE differing key. Fix: added .amatrix_release_prior_resident_key (residency.R) that drops the prior key only if live AND not referenced by another registry entry (aliases preserved). Repro tests/testthat/test-regression-bind-resident-rebind.R (rebind test fails before/passes after; alias test guards over-release).
